title: medatixx - German Practice Management Software & Telematics
problem: German medical practices need integrated practice management software that handles patient records, billing, documentation, and connects to the German telematics infrastructure (TI) for statutory health insurance processing.
solution: Comprehensive practice management software (PVS) with patient administration, billing, documentation, e-prescription, and TI connectivity. Includes 'TI as a Service' for seamless telematics infrastructure compliance. 80+ service locations across Germany with on-site support.
technology: On-premise and cloud practice management, German telematics infrastructure integration, digital medication management (dgMP), e-prescription support
regulatory_notes: GDPR compliant, German telematics infrastructure certified, KBV standards compliant
varden_fit: HIGH — Core infrastructure for German practice management. Proves market demand for integrated practice + billing + TI. Less advanced on prior auth/eligibility automation than US equivalents.
notes: Strong on TI integration and on-site service. Classic German practice software with local support network. Good reference for B2B healthcare software in Germany.
